generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance TemperatureActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator integrated with Building Control System (BCS) for adjusting HVAC setpoints based on virtualized operational decisions"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable logic controller (PLC) enabling adaptive lighting controls through bidirectional DT-BCS interaction"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor measuring real-time occupancy patterns within building environments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental temperature sensor embedded in BIM for semantic alignment with virtual counterparts"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy humidity sensor collecting operational data for environmental condition monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor providing real-time lighting condition data for adaptive control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model containing geometric, spatial, and functional representations of building components with embedded sensor configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, BIMTooling
]

instance OperationalRuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor readings including occupancy patterns, environmental conditions, and device statuses"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoMiddleware, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BCS configurations and AI/ML models for adaptive controls including lighting and HVAC setpoint adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model predicting energy consumption patterns based on operational data and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized middleware for real-time data exchange between physical sensors and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data management platform enabling standardized device integration and data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlExecutionService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform for interactive real-time monitoring of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated framework for extracting BIM semantics and generating runtime artifacts for digital twin deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance BIMTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) for modeling and device configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceModelingService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization of building operational data through Unreal Engine interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering energy consumption forecasts and maintenance alerts based on simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight, MaintenanceAlertInsight
]

instance ControlExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated control and commissioning of building systems through BCS integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingAction, HVACOptimizationAction
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for automated deployment of digital twin components based on BIM semantics"
]

instance DeviceModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for modeling and configuring building devices within BIM environment"
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing visualization capabilities for building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for interactive visualization of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance ConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for configuring building systems and control logic"
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of occupancy patterns within building environments"
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of temperature, humidity, and lighting conditions for occupant comfort optimization"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption patterns enabling operational efficiency improvements"
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for potential maintenance issues based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy patterns and natural light conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of HVAC setpoints for energy efficiency and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor,
                 TemperatureActuator, LightingController,
                 BIMModel, OperationalRuntimeData, ControlLogicModel,
                 EnergyPerformanceSimulation
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates **control signals, commands, or adjustments** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints, occupancy-based controls) and transmits them back to physical actuators and controllers via **bidirectional communication protocols**. This enables real-time operational adjustments and automation based on DT-driven insights."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with **low-latency synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems. The framework ensures **continuous data exchange** to maintain coherence, though specific technical details (e.g., millisecond intervals) are not explicitly quantified in the documents. The emphasis is on **live operational data integration** to support immediate decision-making and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular platform** with the following components:
  - **BIM backbone** (semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic).
  - **Middleware layer** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange).
  - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine for interactive 3D environments).
  - **Service layer** (customizable services for analytics, optimization, and control).
  The framework enables **bidirectional communication** between the PT and DT, with clear roles for stakeholders (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the **entire building life cycle**, spanning:
   - **Design phase**: Integration of BIM models for initial asset representation.
   - **Construction phase**: Validation and configuration of physical devices (e.g., sensors, actuators).
   - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization of building performance.
   The framework bridges the gap between **static BIM representations** (design/construction) and **dynamic operational requirements** (as-operated), ensuring continuity across all phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** for measuring alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Verification and validation** of BIM models and runtime artifacts.
  - **Uncertainty quantification** (e.g., sensor accuracy, model drift) to address semantic drift and data inconsistencies.
  - **Quality assurance** mechanisms for ensuring data integrity and operational coherence."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **standardized middleware integration** (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for real-time data exchange. The framework does not specify low-level protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA) but emphasizes **bidirectional communication** between the DT and Building Control Systems (BCS). The middleware abstracts these details, ensuring **interoperability** with heterogeneous IoT devices and sensors."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed using a **modular architecture** with **scalable, service-oriented components**. The framework supports **low-overhead updates** and **extensible service integration**, though specific deployment strategies (e.g., containerized or distributed) are not detailed. The **Unreal Engine** and **Eclipse Ditto/Hono** are central to the deployment infrastructure, enabling **real-time visualization and data processing**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates horizontally with **heterogeneous infrastructure systems** in the AECO domain, including:
   - **Building Automation Systems (BAS)**: For real-time control and monitoring.
   - **Energy Management Systems (EMS)**: To optimize energy consumption and operational efficiency.
   The framework ensures **interoperability** through standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and **modular service architectures**, enabling seamless data exchange with external systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** and **model-driven engineering (MDE) principles** for semantic consistency. While it does not explicitly reference standards like IFC, COBie, or protocols (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA), it emphasizes **standardized integration frameworks** and **BIM compatibility** to ensure interoperability across tools and platforms."
]
